updates.tweet_text: @Stockgod202377 @Porterhous90889 Impossible to say! This is a fairly young to approaching middle aged bull market though. Another 50% up from here to 10k would be conservative but could go much higher than that still. Has 2-3 years left

updates.tweet_text: @ChrisHux Yes, thats exactly what the chart shows. Bears have full control for now until we get back above there

updates.tweet_text: @tanay1210 @Stockgod202377 @Porterhous90889 Most bull markets last 3-4 years and rally 100-150%. We had a bear market in early 2025. ES down 22%.

updates.tweet_text: Key to remember trading means having a process, which also means most trades should be replica's of each other. If every trade is dramatically different, it is likely gambling. For me its the same setup every trade, the same direction (long only), managed the exact same way
updates.notes: No price levels mentioned at all; tweet is philosophical commentary about trading process and consistency, not actionable.

updates.tweet_text: @DavidDa41048475 Volatility not volume. Volatility just means the market is moving quickly and covering lots of ground
updates.notes: Pure explanatory reply to a user about volatility definition; no price levels named or actionable signals of any kind.
